message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'clear_restore_sigmask' sets signal field 'task_struct.restore_sigmask', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=task_struct;field=restore_sigmask;offset=1240] [oracle:assert=task_struct.restore_sigmask stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets restore_sigmask without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
